description: Post-router execution for group and scene information.
routing_examples: How do I make devices 1, 2, and 3 work together?
What happens when I activate this device?
What other devices are linked to this one?
Move kitchen keypad to kitchen [ group | scene ]
Add the living room lamp to the movie night scene as a controller
Remove the bedroom light from the bedtime scene
Change the living room settings in the movie night scene to turn on at 50% brightness within 3 seconds
Create a cross-link between the hallway motion sensor and the hallway light group
Give me a scene where keypad 1 and keypad 2 are controllers (cross linked) and dimmer 3 is a responder
router_hints: Use this intent for any group or scene question, including explanations, diagnostics, adding a member, removing a member, and updating member link definitions.
